offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 properties, inefficient tracking of energy usage causes compliance issues. We provide a facility management system instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate systems.
problem: inefficient tracking of energy usage and maintenance schedules
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try energy monitoring and maintenance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance tasks
Enable CSV import for existing energy data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
